ddls:
CREATE TABLE "media_assets" (
  "asset_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each media asset */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the media asset */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* URL to a thumbnail image (if applicable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media asset */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the media asset (e.g., Photo, Video, Document) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the asset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the asset was last updated */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the media file in bytes */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension of the media asset */,
  "md5_hash" TEXT /* MD5 hash of the media file for integrity checking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_assets_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES media_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source entry */,
  "asset_id" TEXT /* Reference to the media asset */,
  "source_path" TEXT /* Local file path to the source media file */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* External URL to the source media file */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is the primary source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_sources_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES media_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the media type (e.g., Photo, Video, Document) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log entry */,
  "asset_id" TEXT /* Reference to the media asset causing the error */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Description of the error */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error occurred */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code for the error (e.g., 404, 500) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES media_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content creator, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage log entry */,
  "asset_id" TEXT /* Reference to the media asset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the asset */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., view, download) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the usage event */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the usage event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_usage_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES media_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload event */,
  "asset_id" TEXT /* Reference to the media asset being uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user uploading the asset */,
  "upload_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the upload */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the upload (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "progress" INTEGER /* Upload progress as a percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_uploads_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES media_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_categories" (
  "media_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media-category relationship */,
  "asset_id" TEXT /* Reference to the media asset */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_categories_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES media_assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "asset_id" TEXT /* Reference to the media asset */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., resolution, duration) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_metadata_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES media_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "asset_id" TEXT /* Reference to the media asset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the media asset (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_feedback_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES media_assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
